phases.name: Pre-flight Check

steps.command: aws sts get-caller-identity --region us-west-2
steps.validation: echo $?
steps.rollback_command: # No rollback needed for connectivity check

steps.command: aws rds describe-db-clusters --db-cluster-identifier petsite-db --region ap-northeast-1 --query 'DBClusters[0].ReplicationSourceIdentifier'
steps.validation: # ReplicaLag should be < 1000ms
steps.rollback_command: # No rollback needed for lag check

steps.command: aws rds describe-db-clusters --db-cluster-identifier petsite-db-replica --region ap-northeast-1 --query 'DBClusters[0].ReplicationSourceIdentifier'
steps.validation: # ReplicaLag should be < 1000ms
steps.rollback_command: # No rollback needed for lag check

steps.command: aws route53 change-resource-record-sets --hosted-zone-id $ZONE_ID --change-batch '{"Changes":[{"Action":"UPSERT","ResourceRecordSet":{"TTL":60}}]}'
steps.validation: aws route53 list-resource-record-sets --hosted-zone-id $ZONE_ID --query 'ResourceRecordSets[?Name==`petsite.example.com.`].TTL'

phases.gate_condition: All preflight checks passed, replication lag within threshold

phases.name: Data Layer Switchover

steps.command:
# DynamoDB Global Table: switch write endpoint to us-west-2
# Update application config (env var / Parameter Store)
aws ssm put-parameter --name '/petsite/dynamodb-region' --value 'us-west-2' --overwrite --region us-west-2
steps.validation: aws dynamodb describe-table --table-name petsearch-db --region us-west-2 --query 'Table.TableStatus' --output text

steps.command: aws rds failover-db-cluster --db-cluster-identifier petsite-db-replica --region us-west-2
steps.validation: aws rds describe-db-clusters --db-cluster-identifier petsite-db-replica --region us-west-2 --query 'DBClusters[0].Status' --output text

steps.command: aws rds failover-db-cluster --db-cluster-identifier petsite-db --region us-west-2
steps.validation: aws rds describe-db-clusters --db-cluster-identifier petsite-db --region us-west-2 --query 'DBClusters[0].Status' --output text

steps.command:
kubectl get endpoints petsearch-svc --context us-west-2-cluster
kubectl describe service petsearch-svc --context us-west-2-cluster
steps.validation: kubectl get endpoints petsearch-svc --context us-west-2-cluster -o jsonpath='{.subsets[0].addresses[0].ip}'
steps.rollback_command:
kubectl delete endpoints petsearch-svc --context us-west-2-cluster
# Service endpoints will repopulate from source cluster

steps.command:
kubectl get endpoints petsite-svc --context us-west-2-cluster
kubectl describe service petsite-svc --context us-west-2-cluster
steps.validation: kubectl get endpoints petsite-svc --context us-west-2-cluster -o jsonpath='{.subsets[0].addresses[0].ip}'
steps.rollback_command:
kubectl delete endpoints petsite-svc --context us-west-2-cluster
# Service endpoints will repopulate from source cluster

steps.command:
kubectl scale deployment petsite --replicas=3 --context us-west-2-cluster
kubectl rollout status deployment/petsite --timeout=120s --context us-west-2-cluster
steps.validation: kubectl get deployment petsite --context us-west-2-cluster -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}'

steps.command:
aws lambda invoke --function-name petstatusupdater --region us-west-2 --payload '{"source": "dr-healthcheck"}' /tmp/petstatusupdater-response.json
cat /tmp/petstatusupdater-response.json
steps.validation: aws lambda get-function-configuration --function-name petstatusupdater --region us-west-2 --query 'State' --output text
steps.rollback_command:
# Lambda functions are stateless; update event source mapping
aws lambda update-event-source-mapping --region ap-northeast-1 --uuid $EVENT_SOURCE_UUID --enabled

steps.command:
aws lambda invoke --function-name petadoption-lambda --region us-west-2 --payload '{"source": "dr-healthcheck"}' /tmp/petadoption-lambda-response.json
cat /tmp/petadoption-lambda-response.json
steps.validation: aws lambda get-function-configuration --function-name petadoption-lambda --region us-west-2 --query 'State' --output text
steps.rollback_command:
# Lambda functions are stateless; update event source mapping
aws lambda update-event-source-mapping --region ap-northeast-1 --uuid $EVENT_SOURCE_UUID --enabled

phases.gate_condition: All Tier0 services healthy in target

phases.name: Network / Traffic Layer Cutover

steps.command:
# 1. Verify target ALB health
aws elbv2 describe-target-health --target-group-arn $TG_ARN --region us-west-2
# 2. Switch Route 53 DNS
aws route53 change-resource-record-sets --hosted-zone-id $ZONE_ID --change-batch file://dns-failover.json
steps.validation: dig +short petsite.example.com

steps.command:

steps.validation: dig +short petsite.example.com

phases.name: Post-switchover Validation

steps.command:
# Run end-to-end smoke test against target endpoint
curl -sf https://petsite.example.com/health | jq '.status'
steps.validation: curl -sf https://petsite.example.com/health | jq '.status'
steps.rollback_command: # Initiate rollback plan if validation fails

steps.command: aws cloudwatch describe-alarms --state-value ALARM --alarm-name-prefix petsite --output table
steps.validation: aws cloudwatch describe-alarms --state-value ALARM --alarm-name-prefix petsite --query 'length(MetricAlarms)' --output text

phases.gate_condition: All smoke tests pass and no critical alarms firing

steps.command:
# Verify traffic is back on original source
curl -sf https://petsite.example.com/health | jq '.status'
# Verify source region is serving requests
aws sts get-caller-identity --region ap-northeast-1
steps.validation: curl -sf https://petsite.example.com/health | jq '.status'
steps.rollback_command: # No further rollback available — escalate to incident commander

single_points_of_failure.recommendation: Deploy to multiple AZs or add cross-region replica
